GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP PAGEREF _Toc207110408 \h 3 1.1. Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc207110409 \h 3 2. Add additional custom codes. PAGEREF _Toc207110410 \h 5 2.1. C-000-EX33H Enablement PAGEREF _Toc207110411 \h 5 3 Add Transaction Parameters EX33H Enablement PAGEREF _Toc207110412 \h 6 a. RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction PAGEREF _Toc207110413 \h 6 b. F Pack Pick Cart Transaction Parameters PAGEREF _Toc207110414 \h 7 4 Configure EX33H custom messages in Message Master PAGEREF _Toc207110415 \h 11 5. Post Configuration Instructions PAGEREF _Toc207110416 \h 14 6. Questions and Answers PAGEREF _Toc207110417 \h 14 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETU P Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab . 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additional custom codes. 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX33 H if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under th e Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX33H Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. Add Transaction Parameters EX33 H Enablement RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Navigate to transactions parameters UI, filter for P ackPickCart * Select P a ck Pick Cart transaction and select copy to copy transaction. Copy transaction configuration as seen below. Save. F Pack Pick Cart Transaction Parameters Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for previously created transaction name . Configure transaction parameters assumed in EX33 H extension spec under assumptions section . Click on “EX33 Pack Pick Cart” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Add configuration parameters 536-536 Hit “Save” Confirm Pack Pick Cart transactions have newly created parameters. Select Edit, check parameters, and save . Please complete configuration for all pack picks cart transactions that require EX33 H . Configure EX33H custom messages in Message Master Navigate to the Messages UI and select the Message Master button Select the Plus button to add a new Message Fill out the following fields for the EX 33H custom 3330 error message and click Save Repeat the same steps for the next EX33H Custom 3331 Info message Post Configuration Instructions    Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers    This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken
